transcription.text: Know what this is? It's a man. Of the 15 carloads shipped, transfer 12A units to area 3 and 16B. Talking to a machine. Charges to area 4. And this is a machine talking to a machine. Hello, George. This is Chris over at Purchasing. Hi, Chris. What can I do for you? Well, I was wondering, on that order we just received, can we... You know what this is? A man talking to another man. Man to man, man to machine, machine to machine. In a short time, we've come a long way. And this, already hanging around in the heavens, this is change. You've seen the change, shining in the night. Man-made satellites. So knowledge and understanding, so communication between people, is only an electronic impulse away. So business contacts are instantaneous in any time. In every part of the world.
